description: Pins the config-interface reorder POST body and the duplicate-ids rejection now enforced in both languages (Python gained Go's check). The dup case sets confirm:true so both reach it.

cases.name: rejects duplicate interface ids
cases.expect_error: ids must not contain duplicate interface IDs

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This reorders network interfaces on the configuration profile. Set confirm=true to proceed.
